scripts.sync-assets: rm -rf public/excalidraw-assets && mkdir -p public/excalidraw-assets && cp -R node_modules/@excalidraw/excalidraw/dist/prod/fonts node_modules/@excalidraw/excalidraw/dist/prod/locales node_modules/@excalidraw/excalidraw/dist/prod/subset-shared.chunk.js node_modules/@excalidraw/excalidraw/dist/prod/subset-worker.chunk.js public/excalidraw-assets/
scripts.build: npm run sync-assets && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.zip: npm run build && rm -f staticshot-v$npm_package_version.zip && (cd dist && zip -r ../staticshot-v$npm_package_version.zip .)
